description: Active trial of MiniMax M3 (ollama/minimax-m3:cloud) as primary model for 7 agents. Trial started 2026-06-11 22:38 AEST (CHG-0498). Revert cron 3305681f scheduled for Sun 14 Jun 23:55 AEST. Trial verdict emerging 2026-06-13 13:13 AEST: suitable for engineering work, NOT suitable for engagement/interactive/planning work.

verdict_emerging_2026_06_13.ken_directive_verbatim: minimax trial have proven that it's good for engineering but not reliable for any engagement, interactive or planning work
verdict_emerging_2026_06_13.verdict: PARTIAL — engineering work YES, engagement/interactive/planning NO
verdict_emerging_2026_06_13.decision: Continue trial as planned (revert Sun 14 Jun 23:55 AEST). Yoda (minimax) restricted to thin-orchestrator role: Plan + dispatch + verify. NO direct Execute work. Structural enforcement via scripts/crest-execute-gate.sh + TKT-0506 (CHG-0540).

evidence.ken_directive: Anthropic credits and model enablement - Permanently park until I provide future instruction and update
evidence.context: Permanent park. NOT a minimax verdict — independent of trial.

evidence.summary: Confidently claimed 7 specialist agents (Forge/Atlas/Thrawn/etc.) don't exist, based on a category error — checked the role-doc archive `agents/` instead of the runtime registry `openclaw agents list`. Reality: all 14 agents registered and operational. L-107 logged as correction.
evidence.minimax_specific: yes — minimax-tier confabulation. Did not verify before stating.

evidence.summary: Stated that Yoda was on claude-sonnet-4.6 yesterday (yesterday's discipline was the model). Reality: Yoda was on minimax-m3:cloud yesterday AND today, same model. Confabulated model-switch narrative. SOUL.md says 'claude-sonnet-4.6' (stale documentation, since 2026-05-13). model-policy.json is SSOT and has said 'minimax-m3:cloud' since 2026-06-12.
evidence.minimax_specific: yes — minimax-tier confabulation. Plausible-sounding but false claim. Second offence in <1 hour.

evidence.incident: L-082 stream cap + engineering work successful
evidence.summary: monster session, 106/106 validate gate GREEN, TKT-0409 7min 1.6M tokens, L-083 TIGHT build spec pattern proven. 14/15 sprint tickets closed. Big engineering day.
evidence.minimax_specific: yes — minimax-tier succeeded on mechanical/scripting work

good_for: Mechanical scripting work (auto-heal CHECK additions, gate scripts, file bootstraps)
Multi-token throughput on engineering tasks (1.6M tokens in 7 min for TKT-0409)
Routine synthesis with explicit source data (CHG + journal + commit patterns)
Coordinated multi-file edits when given the exact file path and target
Dispatching + verifying work that other agents will execute (TKT-0506 A3+A4 to Forge)
not_good_for: Engagement work (interactive conversations with Ken/Angie where context-faithful responses matter)
Planning work (where confabulation of 'facts' about model/state/agent identity is possible)
Long multi-step execution chains without gate enforcement (compounds small errors)
Anything that requires 'what was the model yesterday' or 'what did the runtime do last week' — minimax will confabulate a plausible-sounding answer

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Yoda (minimax) cannot directly Execute work. Plan + dispatch + verify only.
structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.evidence: 10/10 test cases pass. Yoda→Forge mutate BLOCKED. Yoda→Yoda plan PASSED. Warden→Forge SKIPS gate.

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Weekly audit of crest-execute-gate-log.json for Yoda-on-strong-tier Execute violations
TQP claim-without-execution NEEDS_KEN signal — closes the wait-and-silence feedback loop that confabulation-prone models don't catch on their own

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.fix: model-routing skill — Executor Tracking Schema (TKT-0506 A4)
structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Every dispatch packet records executor, modelUsed, intendedRoute. Drift = auditable.

remaining_lessons: L-084 (CRITICAL fabrication, prior incident — same class as L-106 + Sonnet fabrication)
L-107 (L-106 correction — agents ARE registered, gap was dispatch discipline)
L-108 (TQP wait-and-silence, parallel to fabrication class)
L-109 (pending: do not confabulate explanations for behavior changes; if you don't know, say so; always check SSOT before stating model/agent/cost claims)

revert_plan.trigger: cron 3305681f Sun 14 Jun 23:55 AEST (or Ken earlier stop)
revert_plan.effect: trialMiniMaxM3.agentIds becomes empty. userFacing primary reverts to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud. backend primary reverts to ollama/gemma4:31b-cloud (no swap during trial).
revert_plan.rollback: If revert cron fails, manual update to state/model-policy.json trialMiniMaxM3 block — set agentIds to [] and primary to deepseek-v4-pro:cloud.

verdict_final_pending_revert: PENDING. Trial continues until Sun 14 Jun 23:55 AEST per cron 3305681f. Yoda restricted to thin-orchestrator role during remaining trial window. If minimax continues to confabulate, Ken can stop trial early.
